title: Immersive Jungles
description: an immersive imaginary biome filled with colorful fruits, vines and overgrown trees!
body:
![title](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1131411938056872007/1134167019701403658/immersivejungels.png)
IMPORTANT: This mod required TerraBlender and TreeLib to work. Please make sure to download them by going to their pages on this website!

![description](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1131411938056872007/1134167070074998824/description.png)
Immersive Jungles overhauls the way jungles spawn, introducing new wood types, intuitive terrain blocks, decorations, foods, and even coffee! all these objects are obtainable in an immersive and vanilla+ way.

 

The better world generation means no more flat mushroom-like jungle trees, no more boring empty landscape below the trees. And above all, now the jungle forests offers way more stuff then just cocoa beans! Now each tree has four branches, each with their own foliage and climbable full-block vines drooping from them. each stem is completely decorated using advanced moss patches, overgrown trunks and mossy wood! Each log provides its own new set of planks, allowing you to build a unique looking tree house in the new tall fancy jungle trees. the vines growing from the new trees, provide players with coffee beans and tea leaves which can be cooked into their beverages.

![credits](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1131411938056872007/1134167089310093312/credits.png)
![names](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1131411938056872007/1134167055688552468/distantdigkekie6.png)
![other mods](https://cdn.discordapp.com/attachments/1131411938056872007/1134167039649534033/othermods.png)
